text: Allbirds says it's ditching footwear and pivoting to become an AI company. - CBS News

text: S&P 500 hits new all-time high as investors shrug off Iran war oil price spike - NBC News

text: Trump threatens to fire Powell, won’t halt probe of Fed renovations - The Washington Post

text: Ancient DNA reveals pervasive directional selection across West Eurasia - Nature
fullText: Analysis of 15,836 ancient West Eurasian genomes reveals hundreds of instances of directional selection, showing that sustained changes in allele frequency were widespread, rather than being rare over this period as previously assumed.

text: Husband of missing American woman in the Bahamas leaves country, lawyer says - NBC News
fullText: The husband of an American woman who was reportedly swept out to sea in the Bahamas has left the country, his lawyer told NBC News.

text: Mike Band 2026 NFL mock draft 2.0: Cowboys take Rueben Bain Jr.; Steelers and Eagles select receivers - NFL.com
